issues.title: Prod-main workflows hard-fail instantly on model/param config drift (effort unsupported / model not found)
issues.recurrence: new this window; 2 distinct prod-main schedules, both all-retries-exhausted with 0 tokens consumed
issues.note: Two variants: (a) Daily Caveman Optimizer [claude] run 27040285267 -> 400 invalid_request_error 'This model does not support the effort parameter' (claude model pinned with a reasoning-effort param it rejects); (b) Daily Cache Strategy Analyzer [codex] run 27034341100 -> 404 'Model not found adelie-alpha-2026-02-19' (codex model id deprecated/removed at the responses endpoint). Both fail fast on every retry, cheap but total. Likely config drift after a model/param change.

issues.title: 429 Maximum effective tokens exceeded (25M cap)
issues.recurrence: ABSENT 2026-06-05 but BORDERLINE: Daily Ambient Context Optimizer ran 25.37M effective tokens (OVER the 25M cap) and SUCCEEDED this window. Cap edge unresolved; one bad run-set away from re-failing.
issues.note: Heavy daily-aggregation workflows hover at/over the 25M effective-token cap. Intermittent; depends on run-set size. Soft pre-cap guard still not in place.

issues.title: One failed safe-output item reds the whole safe_outputs job
issues.recurrence: ABSENT 2026-06-05: PR Sous Chef 5/5 success, Contribution Check 1/1 success. No add_comment target=* failures this window.
issues.note: Agents emit add_comment with configured target='*' but omit the required explicit item_number; framework rejects the item and the partial failure reds an otherwise-successful job. Quiet this window.

issues.title: copilot-sdk-driver headless-path failures (auth + tool-permission + session.idle timeout)
issues.recurrence: ABSENT 2026-06-05: PR Code Quality Reviewer 2/2 success. No sdk-driver lockout/auth/idle-timeout failures this window.
issues.note: sdk-driver path historically produces distinct failure modes (auth-info missing, tool permission lockout, idle timeout). Quiet this window; legacy copilot CLI path remains stable.

issues.title: Copilot agent job concludes failure despite producing a valid agent_output report
issues.note: Test Quality Sentinel [copilot] run 27036058696 (PR event, 27 turns, 11.6M eff) generated a complete 77/100 report in agent_output.json yet the agent job reddened with no crash marker, error_count=0, 20.6m duration. Root cause not isolated from stdio (log appears truncated to report markdown). Watch for recurrence to distinguish from copilot-sdk-driver class.

issues.title: update_pull_request update_branch blocked: GitHub App lacks 'workflows' permission for PRs touching .lock.yml
issues.note: Non-fatal warning. update_branch can never succeed for PRs that modify .github/workflows/*.lock.yml without the workflows scope.

issues.title: create_discussion safe-output lacks label + temporary_id fields
issues.note: Product gap surfaced by smoke test: create_discussion cannot attach labels (e.g. ai-generated) or a temporary_id for cross-referencing.

issues.title: Serena MCP server absent from mcp-cli manifest
issues.recurrence: re-surfaced by Smoke Claude probe 2026-06-05 (also Smoke Codex web-fetch)
issues.note: Environment note: manifest exposes only agenticworkflows/mcpscripts/safeoutputs/tavily. Smoke tests expect serena (Claude) and web-fetch MCP (Codex). Likely config drift, not a regression.

issues.title: Firewall blocked-request ratio
issues.recurrence: 17.9% blocked (701/3909) this window, DOWN from 21.1% prior. Hotspots: Smoke Copilot 67/157 (43%), Smoke Antigravity 10/12 (83%), Smoke Claude 36/147 (24%)
issues.note: By-design SNI/domain denials; no firewall-caused run failure this window.
